title: Performance Enhancer Next Plus - PEN+ - Vulkan
description: PEN+ is your main vanilla performance enhancer that fulfill all your needs and keeps you at the vanguard of optimization while adding the best utilities and improvements. VULKAN VERSION
body:

![Separator](https://github.com/AselElisian/penplus-vulkan-minecraft-modpack/blob/main/Images/PENplus-Vulkan-Separator.png?raw=true)

# **Vulkan version - Description**
Tries to be the most advanced modpack in terms of performance, utilities and improvements, always looking for new additions worthy to be done, from the 1.18.2 onwards, for Fabric and Quilt. If you are not intested in the Vulkan mod, [check my other non Vulkan modpacks](https://modrinth.com/user/AselElisian/modpacks)

Differs with the **[PEN](https://modrinth.com/modpack/pen-vulkan)** version (without the +) adding the most comfortables utilities and improvements. If you are looking for a purist version (only the performance thing), you better download the **[PEN](https://modrinth.com/modpack/pen-vulkan)** version.

</details>

### **Important**

<details>
<summary>To enable Simple Voice Chat and AutoModpack mods</summary>

You will have to port forward the following ports on the server:

Simple Voice Chat >>> Port: `24454`. Protocol: `UDP`.

AutoModpack >>> Port: `30037`. Protocol: `TCP`.

If you don't now how search for a tutorial. Yes, I know I'm not being helpfull over there but the thing is it varies on the server page. Join my Discord so someone may help you, [Discord invite link](https://discord.gg/HFatSHXhJf).

</details>

![Separator](https://github.com/AselElisian/penplus-vulkan-minecraft-modpack/blob/main/Images/PENplus-Vulkan-Separator.png?raw=true)

# **License**
Please do not redistribute from outside of Modrinth, I may upload the modpack to CurseForge in the future.

You can use the modpack to begin a new one if you link back this page.

![Separator](https://github.com/AselElisian/penplus-vulkan-minecraft-modpack/blob/main/Images/PENplus-Vulkan-Separator.png?raw=true)

# **Credits**
All the mods used are not mine, I am a simply messenger that ease in the making of a modpack. The hard work is made by the modders. Please thank them as I do, and if you very like a mod go to its page and support the creator.
